title: DM home restore + conversation search + saved items
description: Persist last selected DM/group per account, auto-open it on DMs home, replace the top DM search field with a DM/groups-only conversation search entry, sort DMs/groups by latest incoming message, and replace the temporary Saved Messages shortcut with an aggregated pinned-items view that can jump back to the source DM/group message. Validate in poly-web.
